flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Loma Linda University fell 11% between 2007 and 2010 (1.1k → 960).

flags.label: Earnings trend · post-entry horizons
flags.summary: Earnings 10 years post-entry at Loma Linda University are 2% above 6-year earnings ($88.2k → $89.8k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Loma Linda University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.4% → 0.0%).
